name: Renegade
description: Bandit class mod for Salvador the Gunzerker, built around I'm Your Huckleberry, Incite, All I Need is One.

special.description: At max level it boosts pistol damage by 57.5% but reduces pistol accuracy by 10%. While Gunzerking, these effects apply to both hands. If your right-hand weapon is a pistol, the left-hand weapon also receives both bonuses even if it is not a pistol.

abilities: +4 Rill I Need is One Skill
